items.title: 3 Stocks With Big Dividend Hikes—And Bigger Momentum
items.author: Leo Miller
items.description: Three companies - McDonald's, Comfort Systems USA, and Amphenol - recently announced significant dividend increases ranging from 5% to 52%, demonstrating strong financial performance and commitment to shareholder returns.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Delivered solid but unexceptional 8.6% total return, increased quarterly dividend by 5%, maintained 49-year streak of consecutive dividend increases
Delivered 132% total return in 2025, 20% dividend increase, 78% revenue growth, and five consecutive quarterly dividend increases
Generated 97% total return in 2025, record $3.6 billion free cash flow, massive 52% dividend increase, strong growth in IT datacom market

items.title: McDonald's (MCD) Stock Moves -1.32%: What You Should Know
